prompt: How many students are enrolled in each course?

inputData.question: How many students are enrolled in each course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How many students are enrolled in each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How many students are enrolled in each course?"},"startedAt":1771855428582,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for enrollment counts per course. The schema shows:
- courses table with id and name
- course_sections table linking courses to specific sections (semester/year/section_number)
- enrollments table with student_id and course_section_id

To count students per course, I need to:
1. Join courses → course_sections → enrollments
2. Count distinct students (or all enrollments) grouped by course
3. Filter for active enrollments (is_active = true) to get current enrollments

The most straightforward interpretation is to count active enrollments per course across all sections.","sql":"SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code","assumptions":["Counting active enrollments (is_active = true)","Aggregating across all course sections and semesters","Using LEFT JOINs to include courses with zero enrollments"]},"endedAt":1771855466769},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code"},"startedAt":1771855466772,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY visualization.title: Student Enrollment by Course
visualization.description: Number of active students enrolled in each course

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code

visualization.title: Student Enrollment by Course
visualization.description: Number of active students enrolled in each course

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS enrollment_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id AND e.is_active = true
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code
